title: GitHub Actions Reviewer
description: Zero-trust PR reviews in GitHub Actions with ChatGPT or Copilot, structured findings, inline comments, hybrid summaries, and setup paths you control.

title: IX Chat
description: Windows tray app for local AI conversations with runtime switching, persistent threads, tool packs, and no IntelligenceX-hosted backend.

title: IX Tools
description: Tool packs for IX Chat and custom .NET integrations, with open-source packs in-repo and private or licensed packs available in supported environments.

title: CLI Tools
description: CLI and local web flows for onboarding, auth, reviewer runs, analysis commands, maintenance, cleanup, and multi-repository setup.

title: .NET Library
description: Native, compatible HTTP, Copilot, and app-server clients with tool calling and streaming for building your own IntelligenceX-powered apps.

title: PowerShell Module
description: PowerShell cmdlets for chat, threads, config, MCP servers, diagnostics, and scriptable automation on top of the IntelligenceX runtime.

title: Issue Ops + Project Control
description: Maintainer-first GitHub Project workflows for issue and PR triage, confidence scoring, project field sync, and proposal-first backlog cleanup.
